items.purpose: Convert a list into a NumPy array.
Creates an array of the given shape filled with zeros.
Creates an array of the given shape filled with ones.
Creates an uninitialized array of the given shape without setting values.
Returns evenly spaced values within a given interval.
Returns evenly spaced numbers over a specified interval.
Creates an array of random values from a uniform distribution over [0, 1).
Gives a new shape to an array without changing its data.
Returns a contiguous flattened 1-D array.
Returns a copy of the array collapsed into one dimension.
Permutes the dimensions of an array according to the given axes.
Expands the shape of an array by inserting a new axis at the given position.
Removes single-dimensional entries from the shape of an array.
Joins a sequence of arrays along an existing axis.
Selects elements from an array using integer indices or slices.
Selects elements where the boolean mask evaluates to True.
Returns elements chosen from x or y depending on the condition.
Returns the indices of the maximum values along an axis.
Returns the indices of the minimum values along an axis.
Takes elements from an array along a given axis at given indices.
Sums the elements of an array over a given axis.
Computes the arithmetic mean along a given axis.
Computes the standard deviation along a given axis.
Returns the maximum value along a given axis.
Returns the minimum value along a given axis.
Computes the dot product of two arrays.
Computes the cross product of two vectors.
Calculates the absolute value element-wise.
Limits the values in an array between min and max.
Computes the multiplicative inverse of a square matrix.
Computes the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of a square matrix.
Performs singular value decomposition on a matrix.
Computes a matrix or vector norm.
Solves a linear matrix equation using a square coefficient matrix.
Computes the determinant of a square matrix.
